titlestmt.titleproper: Vice Provost for Undergraduate Education Records4-13-4255
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-02-10 23:58:21 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Vice Provost for Undergraduate Education Records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Vice Provost for Undergraduate Education Records

did.physdesc: Organizational records, computer files, pamphlets, correspondence, minutes, and financial records.
did.abstract: Files relating to the operation of the office under multiple individuals including Isaac Kramnick, Michelle Moody Adams, Laura Brown and, Rebecca Stoltzfus.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Vice Provost for Undergraduate Education coordinates and oversees wide areas of undergraduate education relevant to all seven undergraduate schools and colleges. Members of the office work closely with the schools and colleges and other offices across the University to promote academic success for all undergraduate students and cultivate intellectual inquiry, both in and out of the classroom.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Files relating to the operation of the office under multiple individuals including Isaac Kramnick, Michelle Moody Adams, Laura Brown and, Rebecca Stoltzfus. Files include documentation for the New Student Reading Project, Menschel Fellow Awards, the Task Force for Ethnic Studies, Committee on Race and Ethnicity, Council for Undergraduate Research, Diversity Week, Einaudi Center, Intensive English Program, English for Academic Purposes, Asian/Asian American Campus Climate Task Force, Diversity in the Curriculum, humanities, race course, September 11th programs, Phi Kappa Phi, other student services.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Vice Provost for Undergraduate Education Records, #4-13-4255. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: September 11 Terrorist Attacks, 2001
Reading promotion
Minority college students
English language -- Study and teaching -- Foreign speakers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Files in this series generally include minutes, Associate Deans group, and email.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Admission of Diversity goals and data; Admission and enrollment overview

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Proposed academic advising timeline; extramural enrollment policies; Institutional Diversity planning; The dialogue project; international guest students; University-wide business minor at Cornell; guidelines for the submission of Academic program proposals; fellowship news;

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research course analysis; Advising Technology solutions working group; Internal transfer memo; undergraduate research project; student assembly resolution;

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Internal transfer policy changes; circular disability compliance responsibilities; Health excuse policy

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Parental notification for alcohol and other drugs cases; charge for educational programs and services plan; reorganization outline for Cornell Undergraduate admissions;

scopecontent.p: Periodic review Report (June 1, 2006); Explore 2007 (intellectual exploration with faculty)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Assessing student learning and institutional effectiveness (pamphlet); Comparative analysis of FERPA-family educational right to privacy Act (buckley amendments) policies for cornell and peer institutions (packet);

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Senior survey; preliminary report of the academic advising committee; Middle states periodic review report milestone;

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cornell University satisfactory academic progress guidelines for undergraduates financial aid applicants; first year family weekend pamphlet.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Survey of faculty interaction with undergraduate students

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Graduation rate report (1900-1995); Survey research presentation background

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolution recommendation that each course syllabus include reference to the Cornell university code of Academic integrity; Kendall S. Carpenter Memorial Advising Award for programs.

scopecontent.p: Report of the Community to review the University Press; Memo's; December 31, 1995 Quarterly Review Agenda; Cornell University Press Sage House five year plan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Memo's; Report of the Committee to Review the Cornell University Press; Observation on the C.U. Press; Statement of income and publishing; Job offer to John Ackerman; University Press Audit Report;

scopecontent.p: Memo's; Performance evaluation; Effective supervision survey;

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Files in this series generally include email, invoices, room assignments, memos, agendas, meeting minutes, study questions, student essay materials, orientations and other programs and paper items related to events such as postcards and bookmarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Formerly known as Provost Awards or Menschel Prize. Files include candidate lists and award winners, letters to award winners and CVs of candidates.
